case_title: JULIE WONG VS. DOREEN C. HOM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $250.00 SERVED OCT-01-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, DOREEN C.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,512.11 FILED BY WONG, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, DOREEN C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-12-2014 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-12-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHOWED THE CLERK THE CHECK WHICH SHE HAD PAID THE PLAINTIFF; CASE SETTLED BETWEEN THE PARTIES. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
